subcodes.first_line: O friends and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! The esteemed Siyyid Aqa hath penned a letter, requesting the composition of numerous epistles [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و اماء رحمن جناب آقا سید آقا نامه نگاشته و نگارش مکاتیب متعدده خواهش
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
